title: anthyllis vulneraria subproles maritima
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subproles maritima, commonly known as Kidney Vetch or Maritime Kidney Vetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating coughs. In herbal preparations, Anthyllis vulneraria subproles maritima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
